answer_en:
Semispinalis Capitis and Cervicis m.
Origin: Articular processes of C4-C7, and transverse processes of T1-T6 (semispinalis capitis); spinous processes of T3-T6 (semispinalis cervicis)
Insertion: Occipital bone between superior and inferior nuchal lines (semispinalis capitis); transverse processes of C1-C3 (semispinalis cervicis)

details: Origin: Articular processes of C4-C7, and transverse processes of T1-T6 (semispinalis capitis); spinous processes of T3-T6 (semispinalis cervicis)
Insertion: Occipital bone between superior and inferior nuchal lines (semispinalis capitis); transverse processes of C1-C3 (semispinalis cervicis)
